Defines a function to compute a hash from a byte array.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a function [`hash`](<#hash>) that computes a hash value for a given array of bytes. The function takes two parameters: a pointer to an array of `uint8_t` bytes and a `uint32_t` representing the length of the array. The function returns a `uint32_t` hash value. The file includes the standard header `<stdint.h>` to ensure the availability of fixed-width integer types. The `#pragma once` directive is used to prevent multiple inclusions of this header file in a single compilation unit.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
